name: Peasant Style Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the fish fillet with salt and pepper.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a medium skillet until it begins to ripple.
3. Add the fish, skin side up, to the pan and sear for 3 minutes.
4. Stir vegetables (lentils, olives, tomatoes, shallots) using a spoon.
5. Flip the fish and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Add balsamic vinegar and cook for 30 seconds.
7. Pour in the reduced beef stock and bring to a boil. Reduce the liquid by half.
8. When the fish is tender and cooked through, transfer it to a dinner plate.
9. Drizzle remaining olive oil over the fish and stir quickly to incorporate into the sauce.
10. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
11. Pour the sauce over the fish and garnish with chopped parsley.
Yield: 1 serving
